growth_records.medium: GITS dilution medium + GOS + soluble starch (total 10 g/L carbohydrate)

up.units: mmol/gDW (cumulative consumption per biomass formed, not time-normalized)

growth_records.cite: Adamberg et al. Survival and synergistic growth of mixed cultures of bifidobacteria and lactobacilli combined with prebiotic oligosaccharides in a gastrointestinal tract simulator. Microbial Ecology in Health and Disease (2014). DOI:10.3402/mehd.v25.23062. [PMC4101457]
growth_records.snippet: Cons(hexose) 183.8 mmol/gdw; Lact 85.4; Ace 225.8; EtOH 41.3; For 113.6 mmol/gdw; Yxs 0.04 gdw/g(hexose) (Table 4, GOS-SS)
growth_records.notes: Table 4 aggregate for GOS-SS medium (experiments 2a-2c), whole mixed culture, per g dry weight (mmol/gDW), NOT per-hour. Yxs=0.04 gDW/g hexose. Bif fraction 12.4% at 24 h. Biomass dry weight from cfu/mL x 0.25 pg/cell.
